creator: aturetta@bestunion.it
text:
I strongly disagree with this patch!

In RT, the following directories

local/html
local/etc
local/lib
local/po
local/plugins

are meant to host local site modifications and should REALLY be kept 
together. You cannot relocate local/etc beneath $prefix/share !!!! it's 
counterintuitive. Much better (and compact) to put those 5 directories 
as sibling under /usr/local/www/rt38

Angelo Turetta
